rulings.Case Title: YANPING TAN VS. PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC, PARKMERCED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday March 21, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC,, SUTRO MANAGEMENT GROUP, LTD., PARKMERCED OWNER LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges all causes of action. Complaint sufficiently alleges duty and landlord-sub-tenant relationship. Complaint does not seek relief under PC 496 for both theft and PC 496. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YANPING TAN VS. PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC, PARKMERCED ET AL

DEFENDANT PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC,, SUTRO MANAGEMENT GROUP, LTD., PARKMERCED OWNER LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint DENIED, request for punitive damages is sufficiently supported by factual allegations re: conscious disregard of Plaintiff's rights. = (501/REQ)
